layout.fullscreenUnsupported: Fullscreen is not supported in this browser. Use Add to Home Screen for the best mobile view.
layout.fullscreenFailed: Fullscreen request failed. Tap the button again.

roomChangeConfirm.title: Switch room?
roomChangeConfirm.beforeBody: The conference will reconnect in the selected room. Finish any active broadcast first.

roomChangeHelp.title: Room change
roomChangeHelp.body: You are currently in {{room}}. The room controls which group hears your broadcast and which yards you hear.
roomChangeHelp.point1Text: Use the room name under your company to move between available Hotline HQ rooms.
roomChangeHelp.point2Text: After you choose a room, the conference reloads and reconnects in that room.
roomChangeHelp.point3Title: Broadcasts stay local to the room
roomChangeHelp.point3Text: A parts request is heard by the yards in the room you are connected to.

extensionHelp.title: Extensions
extensionHelp.body: Extensions are short 3-digit numbers for direct yard-to-yard calls inside Hotline HQ.
extensionHelp.point1Text: Request an extension first. Once approved, the directory unlocks for your account.
extensionHelp.point2Text: Search by company, person, room, or extension, then press Call when they are available.
extensionHelp.point3Text: Your extension works while you are logged in and connected to the Hotline HQ line.

broadcastHelp.title: Need a part?
broadcastHelp.body: Unmute, speak your request to the room, then mute again. Other yards in this room can answer live.
broadcastHelp.notConnected: The broadcast button appears after the line connects.

profileModal.title: Complete your profile
profileModal.body: Add any details you want. You can skip this and update it later in Account Settings.

listenOnly.title: Listen Only Mode
listenOnly.subtitle: Mic is off — you can hear but not talk
listenOnly.subtitleShort: Mic is off — tap to enable
listenOnly.step1: Click the lock icon in your browser's address bar (top left)
listenOnly.step1Short: 1. Tap the lock icon in the address bar

offer.text: Get a free website for your yard

conference.title: Conference
conference.muteShortcutHint: Tap <kbd>Space</kbd> to toggle mute · hold it to push-to-talk · <kbd>Ctrl+L</kbd> also toggles
conference.autoConnectHint: Your SIP phone will connect you automatically

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.getExtensionHint: Get a 3-digit extension to call other yards directly
extensions.requestReceivedBody: We're reviewing your request for <mono>*{{ext}}</mono>. You'll get access to the directory once it's assigned.
extensions.ctaBody: Pick a 3-digit number and call any yard in the network directly — no more waiting on the broadcast line.
extensions.dialogBody: Choose a 3-digit number. Other yards will dial this to call you privately.
extensions.lockedHint: Request an extension to unlock the directory

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.notificationsBody: Get notified about parts requests you missed and incoming calls — even when Hotline HQ is closed.
settings.noDevices: No devices registered — enable notifications first.
settings.iosInstallHint: On iPhone/iPad, first add Hotline HQ to your Home Screen (Share <arrow>→</arrow> "Add to Home Screen"), then open it from there to enable notifications.
settings.pushUnsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
settings.pushBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Allow them for this site in your browser settings, then reload.
settings.requestNewRoomBody: Want to add a new city or market?
settings.roomRequestSubmitted: Room request submitted. We will be in touch!
settings.referYardBody: Share your code and get 10% off your future bill for each referral.
settings.noReferrals: No referrals yet. Share your link to get started!

requestRoom.title: Request a New Room
requestRoom.subtitle: Want to add a new city or market? Submit a request and we'll set it up.

broadcastPanel.noBroadcastsHint: Broadcasts from your room will appear here
broadcastPanel.answeredTitle: Another yard responded to this broadcast
broadcastPanel.listeningTitle: Yards connected to the room during broadcast
broadcastPanel.partPipeTitle: Part request — Year | Make | Model | Part | Specification
broadcastPanel.partTableTitle: Extracted part request from the broadcast
broadcastPanel.transcriptTitle: AI-generated transcript of the broadcast audio
broadcastPanel.participantsTitle: Yards that were part of this broadcast conversation
broadcastPanel.broadcasterRoleTitle: Broadcaster — the yard that initiated the request
broadcastPanel.responderRoleTitle: Responder — unmuted to answer the request
broadcastPanel.speaker: Speaker
broadcastPanel.responseTimeTitle: How fast the first yard responded

members.title: Members Directory
members.subtitle: Every yard in the network and how to reach them
